title: brassica napus subsp. pabularia
intro: Brassica napus subsp. pabularia, also known as winter rape, is a subspecies of the rapeseed plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Brassica napus subsp. pabularia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of winter rape often include the seeds, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal and nutritional properties.
